description: Product Description Home Decor Hand Finished Every product we sell is carefully hand finished to an exceptional standard by our team of artisans We source everything ourselves Our beautiful products are all sourced by our experienced buying team Chosen just for you We only source and sell things we love - fantastic products at great value for money for you! Picked for any home or garden With traditional and contemporary themes there is something to suit all styles and budgets Huge Variety of Home Ornaments With a wide range of themes we have some amazing sculptures for you! These ornaments are a delightful way to add another dimension to your home or garden, and fit perfectly into both traditional and contemporary styles. They all make a lovely centre piece for any garden or home, or look fantastic hidden away within all your plants in a display or border. Wonderful gift ideas for friends or family! Handmade Teak Our range of teak bowls and ornaments are handcrafted in Indonesia from the roots of giant teak trees. Teak is a fast growing tree and the forests are well managed making these bowls really sustainable and beautiful! Nautical Range We have a great selection of ornaments, sculptures and instruments with a nautical theme. Handmade from high quality materials, these beautifully crafted items will make an interesting talking point. Amazing gifts for all those who have an interest in the sea, diving, sailing and exploration! So many choices! - visit our shop to see our whole range!
